Drive transformation with Azure Accelerate for Databases. Modernize your data for AI with experts and investments.

Learn more

Microsoft SQL Server 2025

Accelerate your AI application's time to market by harnessing the power of your data and the built-in AI capabilities of SQL Server 2025, the enterprise database with best-in-class security, performance, and availability.
Try SQL Server 2025 Watch the video
Overview
  • Overview
  • Benefits
  • Industry recognition
  • Solutions
  • Success stories
  • Get started
Try SQL Server 2025
Try SQL Server 2025
Overview

Reinvent your business with SQL Server 2025

    • Utilize authentication through Microsoft Entra Managed Identity
    • Tap into improved app concurrency with optimized locking
    • Accelerate performance with batch mode and faster query processing
    • Track increased uptime with reliable failover enhancements
    • Enhance intelligence by combining semantic search with full-text search and filtering
    • Apply flexible interfaces for AI models, deployed locally or via cloud services
    • Streamline workflows with integrated vector embedding
    • Accelerate app development with LangChain, Semantic Kernel, and Entity Framework Core integration
    Learn more
    • Efficiently process JSON data with native type, index, and functions
    • Increase extensibility by connecting data to any REST interface
    • Simplify querying of diverse datasets using Regular Expression (RegEx)
    • Build real-time, event-driven apps with change event streaming
    Watch the Mechanics video to learn more
    • Achieve zero-ETL, near-real-time analytics by replicating SQL Server data to Microsoft OneLake with database mirroring in Fabric
    • Deploy centralized management, security, and automation using Azure Arc
    • Enable disaster recovery and read scale-out to Azure SQL
    • Get simplified licensing with Azure Arc pay-as-you-go
    Learn more
    • Access mission-critical capabilities to achieve best-in-class performance, security and availability for your Tier 1 data workloads.
    Read the SQL Server editions datasheet
    • Get rich programming capabilities, security innovations, and fast performance for mid-tier applications. Easily upgrade to the Enterprise edition without changing any code.
    Read the SQL Server editions datasheet
    • Build, test, and demonstrate applications using all the features of the Enterprise or Standard edition in your non-product development and test environments. Available for free for use in non-production environments. You can easily switch to production-grade editions with no changes needed.
    Read the SQL Server editions datasheet
    • Build small, data-driven web and mobile applications up to 50 GB in database size with this entry-level database. Available for free.
    Read the SQL Server editions datasheet
    • Simple pricing across different editions to meet your business needs
    • Flexible pay-as-you-go pricing options enabled via Azure Arc
    Read the pricing datasheet
  • SQL Server licensing makes choosing the right edition simpler and more economical.
    Read the SQL Server 2025 licensing guide
  • Software Assurance (SA) is a Volume Licensing benefit program to help customers get the most out of their Microsoft investments.

    Benefits include fail-over rights, unlimited virtualization (for Enterprise Edition), license mobility, and the right to purchase extended security updates.

    SA is a supplemental program that can only be added to perpetual licenses at the time of purchase and cannot be acquired later.
    Learn more
    • View all SQL Servers deployed on-premises, and in other clouds
    • Capture key performance metrics and realize faster time-to-value with monitoring.
    • Gain proactive and actionable insights with automated best practices assessment.
    Learn more
    • Manage availability groups (AGs) inventory and track real-time health status.
    • View Always On failover cluster instances (FCI) and protect with Defender for Cloud.
    • Automate backups and point-in-time restore for seamless application of policy.
    Learn more
    • Protect your on-premises and multicloud data using Microsoft Defender for Cloud.
    • Enhance security with automatic patching and Extended Security Updates (ESU) enabled by Azure Arc.
    • Gain central insights and governance across all SQL databases with Microsoft Purview.
    Learn more
    • Leverage with cost-efficient, pay-as-you-go pricing.
    • Easily onboard new technologies or scale existing ones as your data estate grows.
    Learn more
Back to tabs

Benefits

Supercharge your AI applications with SQL Server 2025

  1.

Best-in-class security and performance

Get the most secure databases over the last decade,1 with best-in-class performance and availability.with best-in-class performance and availability.

AI built-in

Accelerate AI innovation using the data you already have, all within SQL Server using familiar Transact-SQL (T-SQL) language.

Made for developers

Streamline developer workflow to build modern data applications faster and more efficiently.

Cloud agility through Azure

Enable frictionless analytics and cloud agility through Fabric and Azure Arc.
Back to carousel navigation controls

Microsoft Intelligent Data Platform

Pivot and adapt in a rapidly evolving landscape, add layers of intelligence to applications, uncover predictive insights, and govern data anywhere with an integrated data platform.
Learn more

492%

SOLUTIONS

Find the right SQL Server version and solutions for your needs

SQL Server 2025 Enterprise

The AI-ready enterprise database with best-in-class security, performance, and availability.
Try now

SQL Server 2025 Standard

Get rich programming capabilities, security innovations, and fast performance for mid-tier applications. Easily upgrade to the Enterprise edition without changing any code.
Download

SQL Server 2025 Developer

A full-featured free Enterprise or Standard edition, licensed for use as a development and test database in a non-production environment.
Download

SQL Server 2025 Express

A free edition of SQL Server, ideal for development and production for desktop, web, and small server applications.
Download

Power BI Report Server

Create, manage, and deploy interactive or paginated reports on-premises with the flexibility to move to the cloud.
Learn more

SQL Server enabled by Azure Arc

Extend Azure services to SQL Server instances hosted outside of Azure.
Learn more

SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines

A Host enterprise SQL Server apps in the cloud and save.
Learn more

"Change Event Streaming and Mirroring for SQL Server 2025 help MSC to build the bridge to bring our operational data into Microsoft Fabric."
Javier Villegas, IT Director, DBA and BI Services, Mediterranean Shipping Company
